product_overview: RedFlag is a frontend for a litigation file intelligence tool that helps legal teams configure analysis, upload case documents, and query for contradictions via an interactive playground. The site also provides a marketing experience with an animated hero, product messaging, and calendar-based demo CTA.
core_goals: Discover RedFlag's value and decide to try or demo the product
Create and save a case analysis configuration
Upload and manage litigation documents for analysis in-browser
Interact with an AI-style chat to ask questions and surface contradictions with citations
Manage multiple chat sessions and maintain conversation context

features.name: Marketing Page Navigation
features.description: Land on the marketing site to learn product value, explore sections, and navigate to configuration or playground.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Read hero and product summary -> Scroll through Problem and How It Works sections -> Navigate to /configuration
Navigate to / -> Review comparison and trust pillars -> Use CTA to navigate to /configuration

features.name: Hero Section with Typewriter
features.description: Showcases the product value with an animated typewriter headline and illustrative output that demonstrates contradiction detection.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Observe animated typewriter headline that highlights core value propositions -> View mock terminal output demonstrating contradiction detection -> Navigate to /configuration

features.name: Configuration Panel
features.description: Create and adjust analysis settings for a case, save them in the browser, and start analysis which opens the playground.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuration -> Select case type from dropdown -> Enter case name -> Enter case number -> Configure analysis options -> Click Save Configuration -> See configuration summary

Navigate to /configuration -> Leave required case name empty -> Attempt to save configuration -> See validation message for missing case name -> Enter case name -> Save configuration -> Navigate to /playground via Start Analysis

features.name: Chat Playground
features.description: Interactive chat interface to upload documents, ask questions, receive AI-style responses with citations, and manage chat sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /playground -> Upload documents via dropzone or file picker -> View uploaded file list -> Type queries in chat input -> Send message and view AI responses with citation badges -> Create new chat sessions -> Switch between chat sessions
Navigate to /playground -> Use quick question buttons to send a templated query -> View AI response with citations -> Toggle compact view to adjust message density
Navigate to /playground -> Rename a chat session -> Delete an unwanted chat session -> Confirm session list updated

features.name: Document Upload
features.description: Drag-and-drop or click-to-upload documents used by the playground; files are managed in-browser for interactive queries.
user_flows: Navigate to /playground -> Drag files into dropzone -> See files added to uploaded file list -> Observe file count and capacity indicator
Navigate to /playground -> Click dropzone to open file picker -> Select multiple files -> View uploaded file list -> Remove an individual file -> Observe updated file count
Navigate to /playground -> Add files until capacity is reached -> See capacity indicator prevent additional uploads -> Remove a file to free capacity -> Upload additional file successfully

features.name: Responsive Navigation
features.description: Top navigation adapts for mobile with a hamburger menu and supports navigating between marketing, configuration, and playground views.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Resize window to trigger mobile view -> Open hamburger menu -> Use nav links to navigate to /playground -> Close hamburger menu by toggling it
Navigate to / -> Use logo action to return to / from any view -> Use nav links to scroll to a section on the marketing page or to navigate to /configuration

routes.description: Main marketing page with hero, problem section, how it works, findings, comparison, trust, and CTA sections
Configuration view for setting up RedFlag analysis parameters
Chat/playground interface for interacting with RedFlag AI

features.name: Marketing Page Navigation
features.description: Fixed navigation bar with logo, links to sections, and CTA button
user_interactions: Click logo to return to marketing page
Click nav links to scroll to sections or switch views
Click CTA button to access configuration
Mobile hamburger menu toggles mobile navigation

features.name: Hero Section with Typewriter
features.description: Animated hero headline with typewriter effect showcasing RedFlag value proposition
user_interactions: View mock terminal output showing contradiction detection

features.name: Configuration Panel
features.description: Form interface for configuring document analysis settings

features.name: Chat Playground
features.description: Interactive chat interface for uploading documents and querying contradictions
user_interactions: Upload documents via dropzone or file picker
Send messages and view AI responses

features.name: Document Upload
features.description: Drag-and-drop or click-to-upload interface for litigation documents
user_interactions: Click dropzone to open file picker
See file count and capacity indicator

features.name: Responsive Navigation
user_interactions: Resize window to trigger mobile view
Click hamburger to open mobile menu
Click outside or hamburger to close

known_limitations.issue: Chat functionality is frontend-only, not connected to real AI backend
known_limitations.impact: Responses are simulated, not actual AI analysis

known_limitations.issue: Document upload does not send files to backend
known_limitations.impact: Files are only stored in browser memory
